defect: THREE review-gate defects in the superseded freeze. (1) CRITICAL geometry gate: analysis/f1k.py (sha 9d01468e...) computed /gates/power_gate_valid as c_ge8 >= 96 AND n == 1573 — a 97-cluster universe at n = 1573 satisfied every gate and reached pass_gate=true (regression-proven MEASURED via tools/registry/_f1k_geometry_regress_20260715.py: OLD power_gate_valid=True, all_gates=True, pass_gate=True on a planted 97-cluster campaign), so OUT-OF-GEOMETRY data could receive a valid PASS despite the frozen exact C=96. (2) The n_planned intersection disclosure asserted full-PASS power 'plausibly ~0.70-0.75' with no joint-dependence simulation behind it; the ASM-2371 marginals alone permit only [0.4102, 0.8001]. (3) Three corpus pins were PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholders whose underlying data dirs were STALE at the pre-REVISION-6 geometry (kernel-v0-only, 49/54 concepts, n=1440), and the ASM-2025 scoped Law-1 amendment had never become a registry event.
